CustomField.formula: CASE(Sede_Venta__r.Name, 'VASS Madrid', 'VASS Madrid Indus fil España', 'VASS Barcelona', 'VASS Barcelona fil España', 'VASS PERÚ', 'VASS Perú SOLA Latam AMERICAS', 'Nateevo Barcelona', 'Nateevo Barcelona España', 'VASS CHILE', 'VASS Chile SOLA Latam AMERICAS', 'VASS COLOMBIA', 'VASS Colombia SOLA Latam AMERICAS', 'VASS MEXICO', 'VASS México MEXICO&CA Latam AMERICAS', 'NATEEVO DIGITAL SLU', 'Nateevo mad España', 'SERBATIC', 'Serbatic España', 'T4S', 'T4S Advance Solutions España', 'VASS GERMANY', 'VASS GERMANY', 'VASS NEDERLAND B.V', 'VASS BENELUX EMEA', 'NATEEVO M360', 'Nateevo M360 SOLA Latam AMERICAS', 'NATEEVO COLOMBIA', 'Nateevo COLOMBIA SOLA Latam AMERICAS ', 'NATEEVO MÉXICO', 'Nateevo MÉXICO MEXICO&CA Latam AMERICAS', 'VASS USA', 'VASS USA USA&CA AMERICAS ', 'Intelygenz USA', 'Intelygenz USA USA&CA AMERICAS', 'VASS UK', 'VASS UK EMEA', 'CoPilot', 'CoPilot USA AMERICAS', 'VASS AUSTRALIA', 'VASS AUSTRALIA APJ', 'VASS CANADA', 'VASS CANADA USA&CA AMERICAS', 'VASS IT Greece SA', 'VASS GREECE BENELUX&GR EMEA ', 'VASS LATVIA', 'VASS LATVIA DE&LV&RO EMEA', 'VASS MALASIA', 'VASS MALASIA APAC', 'VASS North Macedonia', 'VASS North Macedonia CH&MK EMEA', 'VASS LUXEMBURG', 'VASS LUXEMBURG BENELUX&GR EMEA', 'VASS SWEDEN', 'VASS SWEDEN EMEA', 'VASS Switzerland', 'VASS Switzerland CH&MK EMEA', 'Inside Reality AG', 'VASS Switzerland CH&MK EMEA', 'TECH TRAINING CAMPUS 4U, SL', 'TECH TRAINING CAMPUS 4U, SL ESPAÑA', 'VASS IT US', 'VASS IT US', 'VASS APJ', 'VASS APJ APAC', 'VASS IT US', 'VASS IT US AMERICAS', 'VASS PORTUGAL', 'VASS PORTUGAL EMEA', 'VASS ROMANIA', 'VASS ROMANIA DE&LV&RO EMEA', 'VASS EU SERVICES','VASS EU EMEA', 'null' )
CustomField.label: Sede Venta Filter
